design_plan: rng(seed=42)->hero_asset=hero-0607-2-3.mp4; AIDA: attention(hero), interest(compare), desire(cache), action(CTA); hero math: max-width 1120px yields 2–3 lines; density proof: compare-grid uses grid-auto-flow:dense; label sweep: competitors mentioned; contrast check: black/white pill CTAs AA+.
headline: Super vs Siri — personal AI agents for real computer work

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs Siri. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost.
site_brief.title: Super vs Siri

summary: Siri is becoming a stronger, privacy‑first assistant inside Apple devices. Super is built for people who want a personal AI agent that actually operates a computer — and reuses a computer-use cache so repeated workflows get faster and cheaper over time.
